label.coffee.sensory_text: Apple, Baker's Chocolate, Orange, Silky; Defined by its silky tactile feel, this Swiss Water–processed decaf Ethiopia is refined and sweet throughout, a testament to Suke Quto’s standing as one of the premier sources of exceptional coffee in the country.
label.coffee.producer_text: Born into coffee cultivation but trained in environmental conservation, Tesfaye Bekele returned to his native Guji to lead reforestation efforts after devastating wildfire, ultimately founding Suke Quto Farm and its renowned washing station. Rooted in the highlands of Ethiopia’s Guji zone, Tesfaye Bekele's journey traces a profound arc, from environmental stewardship to the renaissance of specialty coffee in the region. When adoption remained slow, Bekele committed fully to his vision. He resigned from public service and established Suke Quto Farm, eventually followed by the creation of Suke Quto Washing Station. His leadership cultivated trust, drawing in 171 outgrowers who now contribute to the station’s renowned output. Today, Suke Quto stands as a beacon of quality and environmental integrity, producing coffees grown exclusively under organic and Rainforest Alliance standards.
